title: USGS Earthquake Feature Structure
description: Field documentation for a GeoJSON earthquake feature from the USGS Earthquake Catalog API

fields.name: type
fields.description: GeoJSON type identifier, always 'Feature'

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique USGS event ID combining network code and event code (e.g., us7000pqrst, ci39876543)

fields.name: geometry
fields.description: GeoJSON Point geometry with [longitude, latitude, depth_km] coordinates

fields.name: properties
fields.description: All event attributes and metadata

fields.name: place
fields.description: Named geographic region description (e.g., '87 km NNE of Hualien City, Taiwan')

fields.name: coordinates[0]
fields.description: Longitude in decimal degrees (-180 to 180)

fields.name: coordinates[1]
fields.description: Latitude in decimal degrees (-90 to 90)

fields.name: coordinates[2]
fields.description: Depth in kilometers below earth's surface

fields.name: mag
fields.description: Preferred magnitude value

fields.name: magType
fields.description: Magnitude type/method: mb (body wave), ml (local), mw (moment), ms (surface wave), md (duration)

fields.name: time
fields.description: Milliseconds since Unix epoch (UTC) when the earthquake occurred

fields.name: updated
fields.description: Milliseconds since epoch when the event was last updated

fields.name: tz
fields.description: Timezone offset in minutes from UTC at the epicenter

fields.name: felt
fields.description: Number of DYFI (Did-You-Feel-It) reports submitted by the public

fields.name: cdi
fields.description: Maximum reported community intensity on MMI scale (1-10) from DYFI

fields.name: mmi
fields.description: Maximum estimated instrumental intensity on MMI scale from ShakeMap

fields.name: alert
fields.description: PAGER alert level indicating estimated casualties/losses: green, yellow, orange, red

fields.name: sig
fields.description: Significance score 0-1000; higher = more newsworthy/impactful

fields.name: tsunami
fields.description: 1 if event is in a tsunamigenic region and tsunami warning was issued, 0 otherwise

fields.name: status
fields.description: Review status: 'automatic' (machine-determined), 'reviewed' (human-reviewed), 'deleted'

fields.name: nst
fields.description: Number of seismic stations used to determine location; more = better

fields.name: dmin
fields.description: Distance in degrees to nearest station; smaller = better location constraint

fields.name: rms
fields.description: RMS travel time residual in seconds; smaller = better location fit

fields.name: gap
fields.description: Azimuthal gap in degrees; < 180 = well-constrained location

fields.name: net
fields.description: Network code of the preferred/authoritative data source (us, ci, ak, nc, etc.)

fields.name: code
fields.description: Event code assigned by the contributing network

fields.name: ids
fields.description: Comma-delimited list of all event IDs across contributing networks

fields.name: sources
fields.description: Comma-delimited list of all contributing network codes

fields.name: types
fields.description: Comma-delimited list of available product types (origin, shakemap, dyfi, losspager, etc.)

fields.name: url
fields.description: URL to the event page on earthquake.usgs.gov

fields.name: detail
fields.description: URL to retrieve detailed GeoJSON for this specific event

fields.name: title
fields.description: Human-readable title: 'M {mag} - {place}'

fields.name: type
fields.description: Event type: earthquake, explosion, volcanic eruption, quarry blast, etc.
